name: Stone & Saunders
description_short: Stone & Saunders is a credit repair provider based in Columbus, Ohio. Rated 1.2/5 with 74 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Stone & Saunders is a credit repair provider serving clients in Columbus, Ohio. Carrying a 1.2/5.0 Google rating from 74 reviews, Stone & Saunders has an limited reputation among consumers in the Columbus area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Stone & Saunders specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Columbus, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Stone & Saunders operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Columbus, Ohio area who are considering Stone & Saunders should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
